description: Style NotePerfect for those semi-formal occasions, this pair of suede shoes from carlton london is designed for the man who loves to experiment.Product DetailsMaroonish red slip-on shoe with overlays, stitched detailing on the forefoot and tie-up detail on the tongue (also styled like a boat shoe at the mouth)Padded tongue and innerOutsole adhered to the upperTPU outsole with multi-directional lugsMaterial and CareSuedeWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustUse a leather conditioner and brush to restore shoe shineStore away from sunlight
